name: Dr Jinxin Zhao
tagline: Computational biology, systems pharmacology and AI for antimicrobial therapy.
metaDescription: Dr Jinxin Zhao is a computational biologist and antimicrobial pharmacology researcher working across microbiology, bioinformatics, pharmacometrics and systems pharmacology.

currentRoles.title: Research Fellow, Computational Biologist / Bioinformatician / Pharmacometrician
currentRoles.place: Li's Laboratory of Antimicrobial Systems Pharmacology, Monash University

intro: I develop computational and experimental strategies for combating multidrug-resistant bacterial infections, with a focus on Acinetobacter baumannii and other priority pathogens.

My work integrates AI, microbial evolution, pharmacokinetics/pharmacodynamics, multi-omics, genome-scale metabolic modelling and systems pharmacology to design antibiotic and phage-antibiotic combination therapies.

researchThemes.title: Systems pharmacology for antimicrobial combinations
researchThemes.summary: Designing model-informed antibiotic and phage-antibiotic combinations that maximise efficacy while reducing toxicity and resistance.

researchThemes.title: Microbial evolution and heteroresistance
researchThemes.summary: Studying how bacterial populations adapt under antimicrobial pressure, including single-cell and evolutionary approaches to heteroresistance.

researchThemes.title: Bioinformatics, AI and genome-scale modelling
researchThemes.summary: Integrating multi-omics, metabolic modelling and machine-learning approaches to explain bacterial physiology during infection and treatment.

researchThemes.title: Bacteriophage genomics
researchThemes.summary: Building exploratory tools and computational workflows for interpreting bacteriophage genomes and phage-based therapeutic strategies.

projects.title: PhageGE
projects.summary: An interactive web platform for exploratory analysis and visualization of bacteriophage genomes.

projects.title: Dose optimisation against MDR Acinetobacter baumannii
projects.summary: Model-informed optimisation of polymyxin-rifampicin and related antimicrobial combinations.

projects.title: Context-specific bacterial metabolic modelling
projects.summary: Genome-scale and context-aware modelling to understand bacterial metabolic adaptation during infection and treatment.

projects.title: Single-cell heteroresistance
projects.summary: Single-cell sequencing approaches for understanding heteroresistance in Klebsiella pneumoniae.
